description: Renovate is the single dependency bot for this repo (it supersedes Dependabot). Its default managers cover the root project: uv/pyproject.toml, the root GitHub Actions workflows, the Dockerfile, and .pre-commit-config.yaml. The custom regex managers below extend it to the copier template's .jinja files, which no native manager can parse because of the jinja syntax.

customManagers.description: GitHub Actions pinned in the template's workflow .jinja files
pre-commit hook revs pinned in the template's .pre-commit-config.yaml.jinja

packageRules.description: Tag template-file updates so they are easy to distinguish from root updates
Keep GitHub Actions on floating major tags (e.g. @v6); the tag tracks minor/patch at runtime, so only raise PRs for major bumps
